source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.

identity.name: Morphous Turmeric
identity.motif: turmeric rhizome with vivid orange root, green leaves, and cream cut highlights

typography: Geist for crisp English wellness dashboards with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese product labels, ingredient data, and dense form states.
layout: Practical 8px grids, rhizome-ring texture, leaf-vein alignment, compact wellness navigation, clear data panels, and warm tactile shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent turmeric rhizome motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Turmeric transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a tropical garden turmeric rhizome botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: Fresh turmeric rhizome cluster with vivid orange sliced cross-sections, warm ochre-brown root skin, small root fibers, and two broad healthy green turmeric leaves emerging from the crown. Botanical accuracy, crisp opaque edges, tactile wellness ingredient identity, no ginger substitution, no flowers.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the full turmeric rhizome cluster and leaves without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves orange root, green leaf, and cream highlight detail. No cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no bowl, no cutting board, no spice powder pile, no hands, no garden landscape, no duplicate separate subjects, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Turmeric light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Turmeric", derived from the visible transparent tropical garden turmeric rhizome cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible vivid wellness product system.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Turmeric, Turmeric Rhizome, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, English, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language only from vivid orange turmeric flesh, ochre-brown rhizome skin, deep green leaves, leaf-vein yellow green, cream cut highlights, warm root shadows, and tropical garden freshness. The board must read as turmeric root wellness, not carrot, ginger, pumpkin, curry powder packaging, or generic health app UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, wellness navigation, vivid operations dashboard metric cards, data charts, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, cream botanical backgrounds, turmeric-orange primary actions, leaf-green secondary controls, ochre-root borders, cream-cut highlights, warm root shadows, subtle rhizome-ring and leaf-vein texture. Vivid wellness system, practical dashboard and form UI, not a marketing page.
Color palette: vivid turmeric orange, rhizome ochre, leaf green, vein yellow-green, cream highlight, warm root brown, deep garden shadow; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Constraints: no carrot imagery, no ginger-only root, no pumpkins, no spice powder piles, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Turmeric", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Turmeric dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Turmeric". It must feel like the visible Morphous Turmeric light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible tropical garden turmeric rhizome cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop. Clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable labels. Use short labels, spacious modules, and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible section labels: Morphous Turmeric, Turmeric Rhizome, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, English, Japanese Typography, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the visible light board structure, component coverage, typography guidance, token roles, wellness dashboard density, and turmeric visual language. Convert it to dark mode while preserving motif-derived palette roles: deep garden shadow backgrounds, cream cut-surface text, turmeric-orange active controls, leaf-green secondary controls, ochre-root borders, yellow-green chart accents, rhizome-ring texture, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as turmeric root wellness, not ginger, carrot, pumpkin, or generic health UI.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, wellness navigation, vivid operations dashboard metric cards, data charts, data table, filters, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep garden-shadow and warm root-brown surfaces, cream-cut foreground, turmeric-orange controls, leaf-green accents, ochre-root dividers, yellow-green chart highlights, subtle rhizome-ring and leaf-vein overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls. Vivid wellness system, practical dashboard and form UI, not a marketing page.
Constraints: no ginger naming, no carrot imagery, no pumpkins, no spice powder piles, no neon colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Turmeric".
